philosophy: Compounds are meaning-attempts, not canonical answers. Each concept keeps a preferred form and alternate understandable forms. understandability is an advisory ranking aid; human guess-the-meaning playtests decide the preferred form (docs/fonoran-constitution.md).
description: Curated transparent Fonoran compounds with ranked alternates. Components reference ids in data/fonoran-concept-inventory.json (primitive roots) OR other compounds in this file.
